name: Chicago Style Pizza
recipeIngredient: 0.06 US can of tomato paste (6 oz)
0.02 cups Mushroom stems and pieces, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a 9-inch pan.
2. Brown the ground beef and onion in a skillet.
3. Drain the beef.
4. Stir in tomato paste, Parmesan cheese, oregano, salt, and pepper.
5. Simmer while preparing the crust.
6. Separate biscuits.
7. Arrange biscuits in a prepared pan and press over the bottom and up the sides to form the crust.
8. Spoon the hot meat mixture into the crust.
9. Arrange mushrooms, tomato slices, 2 tbsp Parmesan cheese, and Mozzarella cheese on top.
10. Bake at 350°F for 20 to 25 minutes or until the crust is a deep golden brown.
